{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/jade_block.png
|block_health=30
|block_resistance=6
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
|rotation=stairs
}}


== Obtaining ==
Jade blocks can be crafted from 4 [[jade]].

== Usage ==
Ruby blocks can be crafted into [[Cut Jade Block|cut jade blocks]] or crafted back into 4 [[jade]].

== History ==

* [[0.2.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Gem Blocks]]
